review_summary: The translation preserves all Greek, Hebrew, Latin, and German spans intact and correctly applies the glossary term for the section title. The English prose is generally coherent formal theological language, but several passages exhibit awkward syntax from overly literal rendering of Dutch constructions, particularly passive formations and inverted word order. No doctrinal ambiguities or preservation corruptions were detected.
glossary_misses: INDEELING DER NAMEN GODS -> classification of the names of God
